table.name: Name
table.emptySubtitle: Tap + to add your first product

modal.exitBody: You have unsaved data. If you leave now, it will be lost.

shopping.emptySubtitle: Add products or import them from your pantry

stores.title: Nearby stores
stores.subtitle: Find shops near you
stores.error: Error finding stores. Please try again.
stores.notSupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.

auth.guestMessage: Sign in to sync your pantry across devices
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.linkTabSubtitle: Share your pantry with a partner or roommate
auth.linkTabInfo: Your partner must already have an account. Once linked, you'll both see the same pantry and shopping list.
auth.linkTabLoginRequired: Sign in first to link your account.
auth.logoutConfirmBody: You'll need to sign in again to access your account.
auth.linkConfirmBody: You'll both share the same pantry and shopping list.

about.subtitle: Your personal pantry manager. Keep track of everything you have at home.
about.privacyBody: All data is stored exclusively on your device (localStorage). Nothing is sent to any server.

features.quantityDesc: Track how much you have of each product.
features.purchaseDateDesc: Know when you bought each item.
features.locationDesc: Remember which store you bought it from.
features.expiryDesc: Visual alerts when a product is about to expire or has already expired.
features.searchDesc: Find products fast and sort the list however you like.
features.pwaDesc: PWA: installable on your phone, works offline.
features.shoppingListDesc: Tap the cart icon on any product to add it to your shopping list. Mark items as purchased when you get back from the store.
features.nearbyStoresDesc: In the shopping list, use 'Find nearby stores' to find supermarkets and grocery stores near you.
features.mobileDesc: On mobile, each product is shown as a card. Tap it to see all details.
features.languageDesc: Switch between Spanish and English with the language button in the header.
features.sharingDesc: Link your account with a partner or roommate so both of you manage the same pantry and shopping list. Set it up when creating your account.
